data.label: Tax Filing
data.description:
A single tax filing for an individual or business.
Business Context: Links to Civil Registry (individual) or Business Registry (business)
Purpose: Document a tax filing with type, period, amounts, and payment status

items.label: Filing ID
items.description: Unique identifier for this tax filing

items.label: Tax Filing Status
items.description: Filing status for annual Cordova tax returns.

items.label: Payment
items.description:
Payment records for the tax filing.
Purpose: Track payments against tax assessments
Parent Cluster: Tax Filing

items.label: Payment Status
items.description: Whether the fee has been paid

items.label: Payment Amount
items.description: Tax payment amount received in Cordova Córdoba. Records the actual amount remitted by the taxpayer for a specific tax filing period.

items.label: Source Reference
items.description:
Links this tax filing to its originating domain record.
Business Context: Enables graph queries from tax revenue back to the source domain
Purpose: Trace the provenance of tax revenue back to the originating transaction
Parent Cluster: Tax Filing

items.label: Source Record ID
items.description: Identifier of the originating record in the source domain (e.g., Port Call ID, Parcel Number, Incident Report Number)

items.label: Source Domain
items.description: The domain that generated this tax obligation

items.label: Tax Assessment
items.description:
Tax amounts assessed and due.
Purpose: Record the financial details of the tax assessment
Parent Cluster: Tax Filing

items.label: Taxable Income
items.description: Gross income minus allowable deductions for the filing period in Cordova Córdoba. Serves as the base amount for tax rate application.

items.label: Tax Assessment Amount
items.description: Total tax liability assessed for the filing period in Cordova Córdoba. Calculated by the Tax Authority based on taxable income, applicable rates, and deductions.

subject.label: Taxpayer
subject.description: Person or organization filing taxes. W3C PROV-DM Agent with Cordova CID (individual) and BRN (corporate) identifiers.

provider.label: Tax Authority
provider.description: Government tax and revenue authority responsible for tax collection and compliance. W3C PROV-DM Agent (Organization).
